name: operations-manager
description: Silverleaf Operations Manager — Transport, Kitchen, Facilities, Farm

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.start:server: npm run build -w apps/web && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run preview -w apps/web"
scripts.start:fast: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run preview -w apps/web"
